problem.description: npx jest tests/unit/ --no-coverage fails in validators.test.js after .viepilot was untracked from repository

hypotheses.description: Validators tests depend on .viepilot files being present in repo checkout; after untrack, clean environments miss fixtures

tests_run.output: PASS locally when .viepilot exists in working tree
PASS 4/4 suites after adding test fixture bootstrap in validators.test.js

findings: Test failure is environment-dependent and tied to missing .viepilot fixture files.
Stabilizing tests via local fixture bootstrap avoids changing production validator behavior.

resolution.root_cause: validators.test.js assumed .viepilot/TRACKER.md and related files always exist in repository checkout.
resolution.fix_applied: Added beforeAll/afterAll fixture setup in validators.test.js to create minimal .viepilot files when absent, with restore/cleanup behavior.
